notes: v394 — 🎯 Take-profit targets and 🛑 stops now snap to valid ASX tick sizes too, completing the price-step work from the last update. However you set them — as a % or an exact price, on a share you hold or on the buy ticket, and for the auto-pilot's own entries — they round to the nearest real, placeable price (0.1¢ under 10¢, 0.5¢ from 10¢ to $2, 1¢ above $2), just like the buy prices do. The buy ticket's live preview shows the snapped price as you type. Practice money only. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) to update.
